ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction (e.g., Monthly donation to Android-Password-Store (Small)) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving the transaction */,
  "payment_processor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment processor used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "collective_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used in the collective */,
  "host_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used by the host */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "host_fee_usd" REAL /* Host fee in USD */,
  "open_collective_fee_usd" REAL /* Open Collective fee in USD */,
  "payment_processor_fee_usd" REAL /* Payment processor fee in USD */,
  "net_amount_usd" REAL /* Net amount in USD after all fees */,
  "subscription_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the subscription (e.g., month, year) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for transaction failure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_collective_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("collective_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_host_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_processor_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_processor_id") REFERENCES payment_processors ("processor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_profile" TEXT /* Profile link of the user on Open Collective */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_profile" TEXT /* Profile link of the project on Open Collective */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Euro) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee type */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., host, open_collective, payment_processor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "fee_rate" REAL /* Rate of the fee (as a decimal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_processors" (
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment processor */,
  "processor_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment processor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment processor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribed to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being subscribed to */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription ends */,
  "subscription_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the subscription (e.g., month, year) */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the fee is associated with */,
  "fee_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee type */,
  "amount_usd" REAL /* Amount of the fee in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_fee_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_type_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribed to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being subscribed to */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription ends */,
  "subscription_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the subscription (e.g., month, year) */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., transaction confirmation, subscription renewal) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_category_mappings" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "category_id")
)
